text.title: Figma vs Adobe Strategy 2026 Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the figma-vs-adobe-strategy-2026 methodology end-to-end.

step.name: freeze-snapshot-date
step.action: Pin the 'as-of' date for feature claims; tool capability changes weekly.

step.name: build-feature-parity-matrix
step.action: Map each capability used by the design org to each vendor's current GA/beta surface.

step.name: model-tco-three-scenarios
step.action: Compute 3-year TCO under: stay-Figma, stay-Adobe, consolidate-to-Figma, consolidate-to-Adobe.
step.decision-gate: If consolidation TCO benefit < 15%, lock-in cost likely outweighs the savings.

step.name: assess-lock-in-and-migration-cost
step.action: Identify migration friction: file format, dev-mode equivalent, library re-creation cost.

step.name: write-adr-and-route
step.action: Compose decision-record.md. Route to design leadership + finance for sign-off.
